< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.ReferencedInstantMessageType

The type of referenced instant message id.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
None

1

The instant message does not have a referenced id
Shared

2

If the instant message reference id is a shared message
Replied

3

If the instant message reference id is a replied message
AbuseReported

4

If the instant message reference id is a abuse reported message
AbuseReportedThread

5

If the instant message has reference on abuse thread
